flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Edmonds College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (34.6% → 29.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Edmonds College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Edmonds College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.7k → $10.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Edmonds College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).
